title: La sombra del Caudillo
writer: Martín Luis Guzmán, Julio Bracho, Jesús Cárdenas
actors: Tito Junco, Roberto Cañedo, Tito Novaro
plot: The movie situated in post-revolutionary Mexico describes the way politics were done in those times. Ignacio Jimenez is chosen as the candidate of the Partido Radical Progresista, but he isn't so sure about it, because he knows hi...
